creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
Install it with NLS disabled, and see what it happens when you run it.

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/x11/xkeyboard-config/Makefile?revision=319759&view=markup

It was disabled 7 years ago, but on the offchance (I bet I wouldn't remember!) Koop remembers what the problem was I've added him to CC.
